chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Sequence of the Rituals of Hajj

text: 3136 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ : « اَللَّهُمَّ اِجْعَلْ فِي قَلْبِي نُوراً وَ فِي سَمْعِي نُوراً وَ فِي بَصَرِي نُوراً وَ فِي لَحْمِي وَ دَمِي وَ عِظَامِي وَ عُرُوقِي وَ مَفَاصِلِي وَ مَقْعَدِي وَ مَقَامِي وَ مَدْخَلِي وَ مَخْرَجِي نُوراً وَ أَعْظِمْ لِي نُوراً يَا رَبِّ يَوْمَ أَلْقَاكَ «إِنَّكَ عَلىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ» ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3136 - In the narration of Abdullah ibn Sinan:
"O Allah (swt), place light in my heart, light in my hearing, light in my sight, light in my flesh, light in my blood, light in my bones, light in my veins, light in my joints, light in my sitting place, light in my standing place, light in my entrance, and light in my exit. O Lord (azj), magnify light for me on the day I meet You. Indeed, You are capable of all things."
